title: scolymus × castaneus
intro: Scolymus × castaneus, also known as the artichoke thistle or Jerusalem artichoke thistle, is a type of hybrid plant that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to support digestive health. The health benefits of Scolymus × castaneus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve blood sugar control, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support overall well-being and digestive health.
